race.description: Tabtouch Past The Post Payouts Mdn
race.comment: LADY MONEY TALK (11) was good on resumption for the new stable at Albany when only 0.5L off the winner as the race favourite. Getting out in trip today looks no issue and connections have appeared to pull the right rein by choosing to run here rather than earlier in the day. Makes plenty of appeal second-up. RADIANT LIGHT (1) was just fair on the main track here fresh but his trial coming in suggested that he was back in good order. Fitter for that run now and this looks to shape favourably for him once again. Can play a leading role. GOOD SHOW (4) will be fitter for two trials coming into this and gets a good push for his chances with Pike hopping on board. He too chooses to run here rather than earlier in the day and a forward showing is expected. PERFECTLY PROPER (10) is better than what we've seen her past couple and can improve getting out in trip today. ZERO TO SIXTY (5) can feature with the fresh run under his belt.
